original_description: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
best_description: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
final_description: Use before implementing any new feature, UI component, or behavior change — especially when the request describes *what* to build but not yet *how*. Covers the design phase: clarifying intent, exploring approaches, and producing a spec before writing code. Does NOT apply to mechanical tasks (run a command, generate a changelog, write tests for existing code, fix a failing build, read/explore a codebase).

history.description: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.

train_results.query: I want to add a notification system to our app — users should get alerts when their reports finish processing
product wants a 'smart suggestions' feature in the editor, kinda like copilot but for our domain-specific stuff
im thinking we change how the search works — right now its exact match but we want fuzzy/semantic, not sure which approach fits our stack
refactor the auth flow — currently we have session cookies but we're moving to JWTs and need to figure out the migration path
add drag-and-drop reordering to the kanban board in src/components/Board.tsx
generate a changelog from the last two weeks of commits for the v2.4 release
run a codebase diagnostic on this repo — I just joined the team and need to understand the architecture
let's build out the settings page, needs dark mode toggle, notification prefs, and account management
write characterization tests for the auth middleware before I refactor it
what architectural patterns should I use for real-time collaborative editing? just need a reference, not building it now
check the handoff from yesterday's session and figure out what's left on the payments feature
the build is failing in CI on the test-unit job, here's the error log — help me fix it

test_results.query: we want to let users share dashboards with external people (no login required) — need to think through security and link expiry
we need a new feature for bulk CSV import, havent thought through the UX yet
our onboarding is terrible, lets redesign it — new users dont know what to do after signup
execute the implementation plan in PLAN.md for the user profile feature
dispatch parallel agents to handle the three independent migration tasks from our seeds backlog
thinking about adding rate limiting to our API endpoints — not sure if we should do it at the gateway or middleware level
run adversarial tests against the /api/payments endpoint, try to find injection vulnerabilities
I need to debug why the dashboard component re-renders 3 times on load — here's the profiler output
